summary: UK road traffic incident reporting app with photo upload, vehicle info, date/time/surroundings, violation type, liability split, and My Reports history. Legal features planned: Highway Code Citations, Road Traffic Act 1988 References, Case Law References, Contributory Negligence Framework, Insurer-Style Fault Matrix, and Next Steps Guidance. Legal references displayed in a collapsible/toggleable panel.
architectural_notes: Legal references displayed in a collapsible/toggleable panel so non-legal users are not overwhelmed
App follows UK road traffic law: Highway Code, Road Traffic Act 1988, and contributory negligence framework
known_issues: Repeated build failures when attempting to add legal reference features; breaking into smaller steps as workaround

existing_features.title: Add a static data structure (frontend-side) that maps each violation type to relevant Highway Code rules, including the rule number, description, and whether the rule is legally enforceable or advisory.

Add a static data structure (frontend-side) that maps each violation type to relevant Road Traffic Act 1988 sections, including the section number and a short plain-English description of the offence.

In the ReportDetail view, add a collapsible 'Legal Reference' panel that is collapsed by default. When expanded, it shows the Highway Code Citations and Road Traffic Act 1988 References relevant to the violations recorded in that report. Users who don't need legal detail are not shown it unless they actively expand the panel.

new_feature_requests.summary: Highway Code Citations and Road Traffic Act 1988 References in collapsible Legal Reference panel
Case Law References auto-linked to violation types
Contributory Negligence Framework, Insurer-Style Fault Matrix, and Next Steps Guidance
